LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TICOR TITLE COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: TICOR'S DEMURRER TO EACH OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE ALLEGATIONS AS TO TICOR DO NOT REFLECT CONDUCT APART FROM ACTING AS AN ESCROW AGENT. THE ALLEGATIONS REGARDING THE NOTARIZED DOCUMENTS ARE CONTRADICTED BY THE DOCUMENTS THEMSELVES; THE FAILURE TO RESPOND TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST IN AUGUST 2007 IS NOT ACTIONABLE FOR THE WRONG HAD BEEN PERPETRATED LONG BEFORE; AND THE FAILURE TO FOLLOW THE MORTGAGE COMPANY'S INSTRUCTIONS MAY GIVE THAT COMPANY A CLAIM, BUT DOES NOT, STANDING ALONE, GIVE PLAINTIFF A CLAIM. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TICOR TITLE COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: Ticor's demurrer to each of the causes of action sustained with 30 days leave to amend. The allegations as to Ticor do not reflect conduct apart from acting as an escrow agent. The allegations regarding the notarized documents are contradicted by the documents themselves; the failure to respond to plaintiff's request in August 2007 is not actionable for the wrong had been perpetrated long before; and the failure to follow the mortgage company's instructions may give that company a claim, but does not, standing alone, give plaintiff a claim.
